acceptance_targets: [chapter_14_f01] Pass if the revised Tallow scene beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:247 contributes at least one new practical obstacle, cost, or condition attached to the lower route, and the revised common-room/dormitory section beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:319 makes Owen decline or forgo one concrete available human action on the page. Fail if those scenes still mainly rephrase Prue's earlier indictment without adding a new kind of pressure.

[full_award_001] Pass if, by reading the revised scene at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4236, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4240, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4300, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4338, a cold reader can state one new, concrete condition Prue has placed on Owen before the battle. Fail if the scene still only restates that he privileges the larger problem without adding a specific later test.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised Tallow scene beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:247 contributes at least one new practical obstacle, cost, or condition attached to the lower route, and the revised common-room/dormitory section beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:319 makes Owen decline or forgo one concrete available human action on the page. Fail if those scenes still mainly rephrase Prue's earlier indictment without adding a new kind of pressure.
findings.problem: After Prue has already made Owen's human-versus-hidden-work choice fully legible, the Tallow scene and the dormitory scene mostly restate the same diagnosis. That leaves the back half feeling structurally overdetermined: Tallow doubles as a plot-provisioning stop for the route Owen will need next chapter, and the common-room passage reiterates guilt instead of forcing a materially new pressure or cost.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the Tallow handoff beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:247 and the dormitory/common-room choice passage beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:319 so each scene adds a distinct new pressure. Options: give the route disclosure at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:271 a concrete house-rule cost, uncertainty, or access condition that Prue has not already named; or make the post-kitchen section beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:329 force Owen to refuse a specific live social claim in the room rather than rehearse the same moral arithmetic internally.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by reading the revised scene at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4236, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4240, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4300, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4338, a cold reader can state one new, concrete condition Prue has placed on Owen before the battle. Fail if the scene still only restates that he privileges the larger problem without adding a specific later test.
findings.problem: Prue's lake-path confrontation is emotionally true but too often replays an argument the book has already staged in chapters 10 and 12. The scene keeps returning to the same scale/sequence dispute instead of generating a new pre-battle condition the finale will later test, so the chapter spends tension on reiteration rather than tightening the trap.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4236, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4240, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4300, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4338 so Prue asks for one concrete operational bargain rather than another abstract moral restatement. Keep her demand local and testable on the page: a named route, a specific kind of triage obligation, a particular first-year group, or another battle-night condition Owen could actually choose later. Cut at least one repetition cycle of Owen saying the problem is larger and Prue saying people are in front of him; spend that space on the sharper, future-binding ask.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
